indicators.name: marble countertop
indicators.rationale: Marble countertop provides a flat surface suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: two sinks
indicators.rationale: Sinks are not suitable for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: towel holder
indicators.rationale: Towel holder is not related to computer work and may be distracting.

indicators.name: toilet
indicators.rationale: Toilet is not suitable for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: large mirror
indicators.rationale: Large mirror can reflect light and create glare on computer screens.

indicators.name: lighting
indicators.rationale: Lighting may cause glare on computer screens.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The marble countertop provides a flat surface suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard, but the presence of two sinks, a towel holder, a toilet, a large mirror, and poor lighting make it less than ideal for focused solo work.
